payload.idea:
Take a look around the ../t3code app and make a plan to bring in some of those ideas to our own app, specifically around the git features, like showing the current branch, additions/removals along with some actions for things like commit, pull, push.

Right now I see to have to switch over to a terminal to commit completed tickets to git, I would much rather do that task in the app via a button
